"'''Who's Who in ''Star Wars'' Galaxies'''" is an article from [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' 65]] by [[J.D. Wiker]].

The article covers:
*[[Jabba's Palace/Legends|Jabba's Palace]]
*Prefect [[Eugene Talmont]]
*[[Dera Darklighter]]
*[[TT-8L gatekeeper droid/Legends|TT-8L]]
*[[Max Rebo/Legends|Max Rebo]]
*[[Bib Fortuna/Legends|Bib Fortuna]]
*[[Ephant Mon/Legends|Ephant Mon]]
*[[Barada/Legends|Barada]]
*[[Jabba Desilijic Tiure/Legends|Jabba the Hutt]]
*[[Naboo/Legends|Naboo]]
*[[Emperor's Royal Guard/Legends|Imperial Royal Guards]]
*[[Chamberlain/Legends|Chamberlain]] [[Kaja Or'Zee]]
*[[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|Darth Vader]]
*[[Galactic Emperor/Legends|Emperor]] [[Palpatine/Legends|Palpatine]]
*[[Boss/Legends|Boss]] [[Rugor Nass/Legends|Nass]]
*[[Gorr Desilijic Ebelt|Gorr Ebelt]]
*[[Corellia/Legends|Corellia]]
*[[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]]
*[[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Gial Ackbar/Legends|Gial Ackbar]]
*[[Endor/Legends|Endor]]
*[[Sanyassan Marauders|Marauders]]
*[[King/Legends|King]] [[Terak]]
*[[Dathomir/Legends|Dathomir]]
*[[Nightsisters/Legends|Nightsisters]]
*[[Lok/Legends|Lok]]
*[[Nym/Legends|Nym]]
